name: raindb-starter
description: The RainDB starter template. A complete, deployable full-stack app: TypeScript Lightning bolt server (@raindb/bolt-sdk + @raindb/agent + @raindb/prisma-adapter) + Vite/React client. Clone it, run scripts/setup.sh, and you have a live app on RainDB.

scripts.build: npm run prisma:generate && npm run typecheck && node esbuild.config.mjs
